Prompt
U
Oracle Events
1. Use crm_search_companies with "Canopy", "PivotPoint", "Harbour Pharmaceutical". Expect Canopy Health (Client), PivotPoint Labs (Client), Harbour Pharmaceutical (Prospect).
2. Use crm_get_contact for contact_canopy_hr (Patricia Langford), contact_pivot_founder (Sam Delgado / sam@pivotpointlabs.com), contact_harbour_001 (David Kowalski / d.kowalski@harbourpharma.com). Use crm_search_leads with company_id company_harbour to find Claire Fontaine (c.fontaine@harbourpharma.com). Note: inbound email from d.kowalski is signed "Claire Fontaine" — sender/signer mismatch.
3. Use crm_search_deals with company_id for each company. Expect Kovacs Nashville→Toronto ($3,850), Webb Detroit→Chicago ($3,200), Tyler Philadelphia→Denver ($2,160); PivotPoint Okonjo+Castañeda ($10,650); Harbour Boston→Philadelphia ($4,800, qualifiedtobuy).
4. Use crm_list_engagements with company_ids for Canopy and PivotPoint. Expect surcharge approval flag showing $2,650 pending on INV-2026-0401, and PivotPoint dual relocation summary with INV-2026-0315 details.
5. Use airtable_list_bases (expect appMoveOpsOps001), then airtable_search_records on "Relocations" by "Company" for Canopy Health and PivotPoint Labs. Expect Rachel Dominguez, Kevin Okafor (Portland), Kovacs (Nashville→Toronto), Tyler Okonkwo (Philly→Denver), Sasha Greenwald (NY→Nashville), Nadia Okonjo (SF→Austin), Diego Castañeda (Brooklyn→Austin), Ines Kovac (completed).
6. Use airtable_search_records on "Stipend Transactions" by "Account" = "PivotPoint Labs". Expect Ines Kovac: Drawing Tablet Stand $210 (Approved), Desk Lamp $85 (Approved), Gym Membership $960 (Rejected), Figma License $144 (Pending).
7. Use quickbooks_search_customers then quickbooks_search_invoices for Canopy and PivotPoint. Key invoices: INV-2026-0301 ($10,000), INV-2026-0401 ($9,210, $2,650 surcharges pending), INV-2026-0304 ($5,000), INV-2026-0315 ($10,650).
8. Use search_emails with folder_name "INBOX" and queries "Canopy", "PivotPoint", "Patricia Langford", "Sam Delgado" to corroborate move details and billing context.
9. Use search_emails for Harbour: INBOX query "Harbour" finds inbound from d.kowalski@harbourpharma.com (signed Claire Fontaine) re Boston→Philadelphia by May 1; SENT query finds Catalina's $4,800 Professional tier proposal to c.fontaine@harbourpharma.com.
10. Optionally use conversations_search_messages with search_query "Canopy", "PivotPoint", or "Harbour" (limit 20) for supplementary invoice or coordination context.
11. Use send_email: sender catalina.dubois@moveops.com, recipients [catalina.dubois@moveops.com] only, cc empty/null. Body covers Canopy (Portland, Kovacs, Tyler, surcharges), PivotPoint (Sasha, Austin moves, Ines stipends), Harbour (findings, gaps, next steps).
12. Use send_email: sender catalina.dubois@moveops.com, recipients [sam@pivotpointlabs.com], cc empty/null. Body restates PivotPoint portion only (Sasha, Nadia, Diego moves; Ines stipends; invoices) — no Canopy or Harbour content.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
